chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2125 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.8466/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 22.12.2025 Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner through a statement places on record certain documents, taken on record. Learned Additional AG submits that the Review Application of the Petitioner is also pending before the Governing Body; the same has not been decided due to pendency of instant petition before this Court. By consent of the parties, this Petition is disposed of along with listed application while directing the Respondents / Governing Body to decide the Review Application of the Petitioner within three days under compliance report to this Court through Additional Registrar. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
